## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type

- [ ] 🐛 Fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 🧪 Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check backend/` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (including `tests/eval/`)
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` + `npm test` pass (if the extension changed)
- [ ] For extraction changes: added/updated a labeled case in `tests/eval/cases.py`
- [ ] No raw conversation content or secrets in the diff
